mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'RPT', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_RPT_STUP ( CO_ID, RPT_ID, RPT_CD, RPT_NM, RPT_FILE_ID, RPT_URL, PGM_ID, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{rptId}, #{rptCd}, #{rptNm}, #{rptFileId}, #{rptUrl}, #{pgmId}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_RPT_STUP
RPT_CD = #{rptCd},
RPT_NM = #{rptNm},
RPT_FILE_ID = #{rptFileId},
PGM_ID = #{pgmId},
USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
RPT_URL = #{rptUrl},
UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND RPT_CD = #{rptCd}
